meta.title: andr

source.publication: Section 4: Roots, Prefixes, Suffixes and Foreign Words (owner-supplied reference)
source.usage_note: Personal study only. Root, words and meanings transcribed faithfully from the source PDF; a small number of well-attested real words on the same root are included where the source list was too short to form a complete family (4 to 8 members). Parts, glosses, context sentences, mentor note, attempt and construct options are the teaching layer, authored for the Language Garden (LANGUAGE_GARDEN_BIBLE §10).

meta.reviewer_notes: Split from the source PDF’s combined "andr / gyn" entry: the two roots carry opposite meanings (man vs woman) and a Language Garden plant needs one root, one meaning, so they could not stay one family. gyn is its sibling plant.

root.label: andr
root.mentor_note: andr names the male half of a pairing that gyn, its quiet opposite, completes.

attempt.direction_prompt: Married to one husband, or to several?

context_sentences: The anthropologist’s fieldwork documented a rare form of polyandry practised in the mountain villages.
Polyandry was recorded there for centuries before outside law eventually made it illegal.
The film’s android moved so naturally that half the audience forgot it was not a person.
Engineers had spent a decade trying to make the android’s expressions look less unsettling.
The endocrinologist explained how a single androgen could influence everything from voice to bone density.
Levels of the androgen were measured twice before the specialist recommended any treatment.

construct_options.text: A hormone responsible for developing male physical characteristics
A robot built to resemble a human being
A hormone responsible for female physical characteristics

context_sentences: The essay argued that a few of the sitcom’s running jokes tipped over into casual misandry.
He dismissed every criticism of his behaviour as misandry, which made the criticism harder to raise at all.

construct_options.text: A dislike of, or ingrained prejudice against, men
A dislike of, or ingrained prejudice against, women
A robot built to resemble a human being
